summary.shape_sentence: Bullish trend day: early dip, sharp morning reclaim, midday consolidation, then steady afternoon continuation into a near-HOD close.

goat.note: Cleanest expansion after the 10:00 reclaim, lifting from roughly 28,420 into 28,530+.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots mostly marked shallow pauses; early downside failed and later red signals did not create durable reversal.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots aligned with defended higher lows, especially the early reversal base and the 13:00 midday pullback.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 28,500–28,535 broke in the morning; 28,580–28,600 capped briefly before being cleared after 14:00.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 28,370–28,420 was respected early; higher demand near 28,525–28,550 held through lunch.

time_markers.10am_blue: Recovering from the early low and beginning the upside reclaim near 28,410–28,430.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bullish but consolidating near 28,560–28,580 after the morning drive.
time_markers.2pm_green: Pressing upward from the 13:00 higher low and starting the afternoon continuation near 28,600.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near the session high around 28,710 after a late push into 28,725.

takeaway: Bullish trend day with early downside rejection, morning reclaim, lunch higher-low base, and sustained afternoon continuation into a near-HOD close.
